title: Bug Types in LLM-Generated Code: A Reproducible Empirical Pipeline
description: A reproducible pipeline for generating, testing, labeling, and analyzing bug types in LLM-generated Python code on HumanEval. The artifact includes model generations, execution results, bug labels, LOGIC subtype labels, LLM-vs-LLM agreement outputs, tables, figures, manuscript drafts, and release-audit utilities.
notes: Public repository: https://github.com/XZXAAAA/llm-code-bug-taxonomy-artifact. Do not archive .env or API keys.
